title: Chicken Casserole
description: A delicious and hearty chicken casserole dish made with crunchy chicken and brazilian spices.
instructions: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and Brazilian spices.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides.
Transfer chicken to a casserole dish.
Add crunchy chicken nuggets, onion, and garlic to the skillet.
Transfer the mixture to the casserole dish with the chicken.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
